prompt: Write a short poem (8–16 lines) about the feeling of finishing a long project. Any form you like.
response:
Relief and joy, a sublime release,
A massive weight bypassing my knees.
The ghost of doubt now finally banished,
While tips of new ideas I have fetched.
I stare at what my hands have created,
This journey long with hills numerically communicated.
The struggle, the doubt, the late nights spent,
Now solid seems, at last, the intent.
